LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT JULES RADCLIFFE'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS GRANTED AS TO THE MAY 9, 2011 SERVICE OF PROCESS WITHOUT DECIDING ANY ISSUE WITH RESPECT TO ANY SUBSEQUENT SERVICE. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
